mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate lowers the discount rate on equities and supports valuation expansion, so a sustained easing trend predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX forward returns are not higher than baseline when FEDFUNDS is trending down, or if the signal's rolling rank IC stays below 0.03 for any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals labor market deterioration and weaker household income growth, which suppresses equity demand and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes deliver positive 20-day SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if the triggered average return is not below the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS growth and HOUST growth weaken together, the signal reflects broad domestic demand softening and reduced cyclical earnings momentum, implying negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint weak-demand condition does not outperform either proxy alone, or if 60-day forward returns are not negative in the bottom-quartile joint state.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained improvement in INDPRO indicates stronger industrial output and inventory normalization, which supports earnings expectations and yields positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if month-over-month rises in INDPRO do not correspond to above-baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if the rolling correlation turns negative for any 2-year span.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in HOUST above its recent range signals housing-cycle acceleration and stronger downstream spending, which should lift equity prices over the following week.
failure_condition: Reject if threshold-crossing episodes fail to produce positive 5-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the average triggered return is not above the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is easing while FEDFUNDS remains elevated, real policy pressure is falling and liquidity conditions improve, creating a bullish equity impulse over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined low-inflation/high-rate state does not outperform either CPIAUCSL or FEDFUNDS alone, or if 20-day forward returns are not positive in the joint state.

mechanism_narrative: In a labor-tight regime, low UNRATE supports wage income and consumption resilience, so unchanged or falling unemployment should predict positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if in low-unemployment periods the 60-day SPX forward return is not positive on average, or if PAYEMS growth adds no incremental explanatory power beyond UNRATE.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in GDPC1 growth after a prior expansion signals weaker aggregate demand and lower future earnings revisions, which should translate into negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth slows versus prior quarter
failure_condition: Reject if GDP slowdowns are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the relationship disappears once quarterly release timing is respected.
